message:
fix(render,runtime,text,widgets): degradation floor test fixes, kp_tokenize optimization, and word navigation correction

Test fixes for degradation floor integration:
- budget.rs: Replace fast_controller() helper with explicit
  BudgetControllerConfig that sets degradation_floor=SkipFrame in the
  deterministic replay test, since fast_controller used the default
  SimpleBorders floor which prevented full degradation
- degradation_cascade.rs: Set degradation_floor >= min_trigger_level
  in min_trigger_level_enforced test so the jump is not blocked
- recipe_b_tail_safe_controller.rs: Set degradation_floor=SkipFrame
  in sustained_overload_progressively_degrades to allow full
  progressive degradation through all levels

Performance optimization (ftui-text/wrap.rs):
- Rewrite kp_tokenize() to use byte-offset tracking instead of
  String allocation for merging adjacent content segments
- All content and space segments now use Cow::Borrowed slices into
  the original text, eliminating heap allocations during tokenization
- Adjacent space merging uses byte-range extension instead of
  String::push_str, keeping the zero-allocation property

Bug fix (ftui-widgets/input.rs):
- Fix move_cursor_word_backward to first skip spaces, then identify
  the target class (word or punctuation) at the new position, and
  skip that entire class — previously it skipped all non-word chars
  (including punctuation) as a single group, causing the cursor to
  jump over punctuation + preceding word together
- Fix move_cursor_word_forward with matching logic: when on space,
  skip to next non-space; when on word/punct, skip current class
  then skip trailing spaces

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
